hooks.command: python3 -c "import os,json,sys; i=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')); 'juan-pavas-cv.pdf' in i.get('file_path','') and (print('BLOCKED: juan-pavas-cv.pdf is binary — replace the file directly.') or sys.exit(1))"

python3 -c "import os,json,subprocess,sys; i=json.loads(os.environ.get('CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT','{}')); fp=i.get('file_path',''); fp.endswith('script.js') and sys.exit(subprocess.run(['node','--check',fp],capture_output=True,text=True).returncode or print('✓ script.js syntax OK') or 0)"
